claimText: ANU maintains a 'Generative AI and Assessment' resource collection providing step-by-step advice on designing assessments in the age of AI, covering assessment planning, evaluation, and approach determination.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI and Assessment - ANU Learning and Teaching
